welcome.title: Welcome back,

aiAnalytics.label: AI Analytics
aiAnalytics.desc: Pattern recognition and predictive crime modelling

reports.label: Reports

personnel.label: Personnel

caseFiles.label: Case Files
caseFiles.desc: Structured case records and evidence linking

intelligence.label: Intelligence
intelligence.desc: Aggregated field intelligence and source reports

admin.label: Admin
admin.desc: User access control, audit logs and settings

assistant.label: Assistant
assistant.desc: Chat assistant for questions and case help
